nasb.text: For you shall see the land at a distance, but you shall not go there, into the land which I am giving the sons of Israel.”

esv.text: For you shall see the land before you, but you shall not go there, into the land that I am giving to the people of Israel.”

cnv.text: 我賜給以色列人的地，你可以從對面觀看，卻不得進去。”

ccb.text: 所以，你只能远远地观看我要赐给以色列人的土地，却不能进去。”
